_README: KIT PARTAGÉ — style + cadrage + negatives communs à TOUS les persos. Réglé une fois, jamais ouvert au quotidien. Pour porter le système dans un autre projet : copie tout prompts/avatar/ et adapte SEULEMENT ce fichier. Le compilateur de setup.md lit ici.

style.palette: muted pastel lilac with soft warm tones
style.style_line: 2D anime illustration, soft cel-shading, clean delicate line art, muted pastel lilac palette, cozy wholesome wellness app aesthetic, soft warm lighting.

framing.composition: full-body standing character reference, visible from head to shoes
framing.camera_angle: front-facing with slight natural three-quarter body angle

sprite_alignment.purpose: all variants must align as sprites for smooth animation

position_locks.character_center_x: exactly centered on canvas vertical axis
position_locks.feet_baseline: same vertical position across all variants
position_locks.top_of_hair: same upper margin across all variants
position_locks.body_scale: same height and width across all variants
position_locks.camera: same front-facing slight three-quarter camera angle

variant_preamble: Use the MASTER image as the strict reference for identity, scale, pose base, framing, outfit, hairstyle and alignment. Preserve: same canvas size, same character centerline, same feet baseline, same head position, same body scale, same camera angle, same outfit, same hairstyle, same hair length, same background, same lighting family. Only change: facial expression, eyebrow tension, eye openness, mouth shape, blush/tears, subtle hand/arm variation if requested, small emotional props if requested. Do not move the character on the canvas, do not change the full-body framing, do not crop, do not resize.
